title: lovely earthen german buckwheat pilaf
description: earthy, crisp, comforting german dish featuring buckwheat, miso-marinate, dairy-free-friendly
instructions: heat the olive oil in a copper-mug over medium-high heat.
add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
add the buckwheat groats and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
add the vegetable broth, vegan miso paste, thyme, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover the copper-mug.
simmer for 20 minutes, or until the buckwheat is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
